originalTitle: US sanctions Rwanda's military and top commanders over fighting in DR Congo
title: US sanctions Rwanda's military and top commanders over fighting in DR Congo
content: Rwanda accused Washington's move as “one sided” and politically motivated.

originalTitle: Anglican divisions deepen as rebel clerics pick rival to first female leader
title: Anglican divisions deepen as rebel clerics pick rival to first female leader
content: Conservative clerics are meeting in Nigeria to choose a rival to the first female Archbishop of Canterbury.

title: At least 169 people killed in South Sudan 'surprise' attack
content: Peacekeepers are sheltering about 1,000 civilians near their base and providing emergency care.

title: Hillary Clinton walks out of Epstein deposition after photo leak

title: Could the US run low on weapons for its assault on Iran?
content: Analysts say the US could run low on vital interceptor missiles within weeks.

title: Israeli strikes in Beirut as Hezbollah launches drones at Israel
content: Clouds of smoke rose over Beirut’s southern suburbs as Israel escalated its bombardment of the Lebanese capital.

title: Six US soldiers killed in Iranian strike on Kuwait base

originalTitle: 'They hit so hard the house was shaking': Iranians describe impact of US-Israel attacks
title: 'They hit so hard the house was shaking': Iranians describe impact of US-Israel attacks
content: People in Iran tell the BBC they hear explosions day and night, as the US and Israel continue striking the country for a third day.

originalTitle: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies
title: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies
content: Emmanuel Macron said eight countries could enjoy protection from France's nuclear umbrella - but that Paris would retain sole decision-making power.

title: Can Chelsea kick-start faltering Palmer?
content: Why Cole Palmer, named the eighth‑best player in the world at the Ballon d'Or ceremony in September, is struggling to match his sensational 2024.

title: The one that got away - Carrick returns to Tyneside with Man Utd
content: Michael Carrick will very much be a Manchester United man when he takes his side to St James' Park on Wednesday night - but the boyhood Newcastle United supporter has not forgotten his roots.

originalTitle: Ex-Chelsea player Luis sacked by Flamengo after 8-0 win
title: Ex-Chelsea player Luis sacked by Flamengo after 8-0 win
content: Ex-Chelsea defender Filipe Luis is sacked by Flamengo just hours after the club records an 8-0 win to reach this weekend's Campeonato Carioca final.
